articles.title: Police: Mass. man allegedly stabbed friend during fight over woman at Miami Beach bachelor party
articles.description:
The man allegedly said that the weapon used to stab his friend never belonged to him, according to police.

The post Police: Mass. man allegedly stabbed friend during fight over woman at Miami Beach bachelor party appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts man stabbed his friend during a bachelor party fight in Miami Beach.
The incident involved a dispute over a woman, escalating to violence.
Boston residents may face increased concerns about safety during travel to party destinations.
